name: Associated Press
notes: P127 empty by design — AP is a member-owned not-for-profit cooperative. Ownership type inferred from P31='nonprofit organization'. Needs a cooperative type-tag.

name: The Guardian
notes: Owned by Scott Trust Limited via Guardian Media Group. Wikidata flattens to GMG. Need manual enrichment for trust parent.

parent_owner: Department for Culture Media and Sport
notes: P127 empty; P749 returns UK government department. Ownership type = public broadcaster (royal charter).

name: The Wall Street Journal
notes: WSJ country field missing in Wikidata (P17 empty). Known: US. Parent of Dow Jones is News Corp — need a 2-hop query. Manual enrichment trivial.

name: Bloomberg News
notes: Private company owned by Michael Bloomberg (88%).

name: Politico
notes: Owned by Axel Springer (German public co) since 2021.

name: The Washington Post
notes: Owner is an individual, not a company (Nash Holdings). Needs owner_type='individual' + optional holding-company denormalization.

name: Daily Mail
notes: Wikidata also lists Viscount Rothermere as co-owner (ultimate controlling shareholder). Need policy: company vs. ultimate beneficial owner.

name: NPR
notes: Member-supported nonprofit; no P127. Type inferred. Ownership model similar to AP (cooperative/public).

name: Al Jazeera
notes: State-funded by Qatari royal family. Type needs manual enrichment ('state_adjacent' vs 'private').

name: The Atlantic
notes: Owned by Laurene Powell Jobs' Emerson Collective since 2017.

name: HuffPost
notes: BuzzFeed acquired HuffPost from Verizon in 2020. Public co (NASDAQ: BZFD).

name: Axios
notes: Acquired by Cox Enterprises (private US conglomerate) in 2022.

name: Breitbart News
notes: Wikidata P127 returns 'Andrew Breitbart' (founder, deceased 2012). Currently owned by Breitbart News Network LLC. Wikidata data is STALE. Manual correction needed.

name: Vox Media
notes: P127 empty in Wikidata. Actual owner: Penske Media Corporation (majority stake since 2024 merger). Data gap — requires manual enrichment.

name: National Review
notes: P127 empty in Wikidata. Actually owned by National Review Institute (501(c)(3)). Data gap — requires manual enrichment.
